Lyrics.text:
Ao Ziona any ambony
Misy re fonenan-tsoa
Any tsy mba hisy intsony
Ranomaso, sento koa.
Eny, ao an-danitra avo,
Eo anatrehan-dRay,
Feno hira maharavo
No hihaonantsika indray.

Any misy an’i Jeso,
’Lay Mpamonjy tena tia,
Ka niaritra ny eso
Mba hampody ny mpania.
Eny, ao an-danitra avo,
Eo anatrehan-dRay,
Feno hira maharavo
No hihaonantsika indray.

Ao hifankahita tava
Amin-kavana tety,
Fa ilay alim-be hisava,
He! mazava ny ary.
Eny, ao an-danitra avo,
Eo anatrehan-dRay,
Feno hira maharavo
No hihaonantsika indray.

Koa mahereza àry,
Mijere ny Tomponao
Dia hahalavorary
Sy handresy ianao.
Eny, ho sambatra ao ambony
Eo anatrehan-dRay
Tsy hisaraka intsony
Eny, ho mandrakizay.
